_meta.note: 22nd major-arc enrichment dip; 4th of the A-roundup campaign (Matt S154) and the FIRST to use the generic mint_enrichment.py/finalize_enrichment.py tool (S158). BUILD + ENRICH with a HEAVY dedup: Jaime is a saturated POV (156 out-edges) with a dense, well-built dyad web (280 internal edges) but a thin event-causal layer (only 8 causal internal edges) — the Riverrun-siege RESOLUTION was entirely unbuilt (siege-of-riverrun hub cOut=0). 3 NEW nodes + 24 edges. MARQUEE: (a) the Riverrun resolution spine — minted edmure-yields-riverrun (the trebuchet-coerced surrender) + blackfish-escapes-riverrun (Brynden slips the Water Gate downriver), wiring siege-of-riverrun's first causal downstream [siege ENABLES yield ENABLES {escape, gallows-burned}] so --full-chain now walks the resolution; jaime MANIPULATES edmure via_threat (the 'I'll send him to you when he's born. With a trebuchet.' coercion); edmure AGENT_IN BOTH the yield AND the escape (he confessed he raised the Water Gate gap — the surrender of the castle, NOT his uncle); (b) the marquee Jaime/Cersei rupture — minted jaime-burns-cerseis-letter ('Put this in the fire'), cross-arc seam cersei-is-stripped-and-imprisoned ENABLES it (the S140 Cersei's-downfall arc flows in); (c) the Oathkeeper/Ice object cluster — lit the 0-incoming oathkeeper + ice: ice REFORGED_INTO oathkeeper + widows-wail (Tywin melts Ice), oathkeeper GIFTED_TO brienne (the marquee Catelyn-vow token), jaime OWNS oathkeeper; (d) lit addam-marbrand (0 event-roles) via the Blackfish-hunt; jaime NEGOTIATES_WITH brynden (the parley — NO jaime<->blackfish edge existed). WHODUNIT done HONESTLY: karyl-vance + clement-piper SUSPECTED_OF the escape (Jaime's UNPROVEN suspicion the riverlords abetted it — 'more like to help the Blackfish escape than clap him into fetters'; the garrison swore they knew nothing and Jaime believed them — left as suspicion, flagged verify). DROPPED at synthesis: the separate jaime-coerces-with-trebuchet event node (over-engineering — folded into the MANIPULATES dyad + COMMANDS_IN); the reflexive jaime-burns-letter MOTIVATES jaime (odd self-edge); oathkeeper/widows-wail MADE_OF valyrian-steel (valyrian-steel node is mis-typed object.artifact not object.material — type-misfit, separate cleanup); jaime DECEIVES genna/emmon (the jaime-lies-about-cleos event already reifies it). DEDUP killed the whole dyad web + the S100 siege hub roles + S141 Brienne/Oathkeeper-WIELDED_IN + S142 wildfire + S109 Tysha. THEORY-GATED (node-prose, NO edges): Jaime-as-valonqar, the Joanna/silent-sister dream prophecy. NO TWOW. NO container tag (the Riverlands is not one of the 5 approved containers).

edges.quote: hauling down the direwolf of Stark in token of surrender
edges.note: Edmure performs the act of surrender — hauls down the Stark direwolf banner to yield Riverrun. The resolution beat of the siege-of-riverrun hub (which had cOut=0).

edges.quote: If I speak the command, my coz will bridge your moat and break your gate.
edges.note: Jaime is the orderer/instigator who produced the surrender by coercion (he commands the siege; the threat to assault is what forces the yield). COMMANDS_IN = orderer who did not personally execute the surrender.

edges.quote: hauling down the direwolf of Stark in token of surrender
edges.note: The surrender is set at Riverrun (the castle yielded).

edges.quote: In the confusion of the castle changing hands
edges.note: The surrender is the resolving beat WITHIN the siege of Riverrun.

edges.quote: You've seen the ladders, the towers, the trebuchets, the rams.
edges.note: The siege apparatus (encirclement, the engines, overwhelming numbers) is the precondition that makes surrender Edmure's only option. ENABLES not CAUSES — Edmure's coerced free choice is the proximate act. Gives the siege-of-riverrun hub its first causal downstream (cOut was 0).

edges.quote: I'll send him to you when he's born. With a trebuchet.
edges.note: The marquee coercion: Jaime breaks Edmure's resistance by threatening to trebuchet his unborn child by Roslin Frey into the keep if Edmure does not yield. MANIPULATES via_threat — Edmure is used as a tool via the threat to his child. The mechanism that produces the surrender.

edges.quote: By the next morning little remained of the Frey encampment but flies, horse dung, and Ser Ryman's gallows
edges.note: The surrender ended the siege, which enabled Jaime to order the siege engines and Ryman Frey's gallows put to the torch. Lights the causally-islanded jaime-orders-siege-equipment-and-gallows-burned node (cOut=0 cIn=0 causal).

edges.quote: My uncle is a strong swimmer. After dark, he pulled himself beneath the spikes.
edges.note: The Blackfish physically executes the escape — swims out under the raised Water Gate and beneath the river boom after dark rather than yield.

edges.quote: We raised the portcullis on the Water Gate. Not all the way, just three feet or so.
edges.note: Hidden-agency finding: Edmure deliberately arranged the escape mechanism — he had the Water Gate portcullis raised three feet underwater to leave a submerged gap, timing his surrender to give the Blackfish cover. He yielded the castle, not his uncle. Edmure is an AGENT, not a bystander.

edges.quote: a black fish in a black river floating quietly downstream
edges.note: The escape originates at Riverrun, down the Tumblestone/Red Fork under the boom.

edges.quote: it had been the next morning before Jaime had been informed that the Blackfish was not amongst the prisoners
edges.note: The escape is a beat within the siege's resolution — discovered the morning after the castle changed hands.

edges.quote: In the confusion of the castle changing hands, it had been the next morning before Jaime had been informed that the Blackfish was not amongst the prisoners.
edges.note: The surrender and the castle changing hands created the confusion that let the Blackfish's (pre-planned) escape go undetected until morning. ENABLES — the surrender opened the window; the Blackfish's own swimming + Edmure's Water-Gate gap are the proximate acts.

edges.quote: Ser Addam Marbrand was leading the search on the south side of the river
edges.note: Addam Marbrand leads the (fruitless) post-escape hunt for the Blackfish. First book-cited event-role edge for addam-marbrand (he had 0 event-roles).

edges.quote: Vance and Piper and their ilk were more like to help the Blackfish escape than clap him into fetters.
edges.note: WHODUNIT done HONESTLY: Jaime suspects the riverlords (names Vance) would sooner shelter the Blackfish than catch him, and pointedly declines to enlist them in the search. UNPROVEN — Edmure's confession shows the escape was arranged by Edmure + executed by Brynden alone, and the garrison 'to a man swore they knew nothing' (which Jaime believed). SUSPECTED_OF (Tier-2, never proven) is the honest model; flagged verify for the gate to potentially drop as too diffuse.

edges.quote: Vance and Piper and their ilk were more like to help the Blackfish escape than clap him into fetters.
edges.note: Same passage; Lord Piper named alongside Vance as a riverlord Jaime suspects of being willing to abet the escape. UNPROVEN; honest SUSPECTED_OF, flagged verify.

edges.quote: Put this in the fire.
edges.note: Jaime orders Cersei's plea-for-help letter burned unanswered — the decisive act of the Jaime/Cersei rupture. He sends no reply and does not ride to her aid.

edges.quote: Jaime read it in the window seat, bathed in the light of that cold white morning.
edges.note: The letter is read and burned at Riverrun, on the first snowfall of winter.

edges.quote: Come at once, she said. Help me. Save me.
edges.note: CROSS-ARC SEAM (S140 Cersei's-downfall -> Jaime/Riverlands): Cersei's imprisonment by the Faith is what drives her desperate Qyburn-relayed plea to Jaime, which he then burns. ENABLES — her captivity is the precondition; a free third-party act (Cersei writing, Qyburn relaying) produces the letter Jaime receives.

edges.quote: Come at once, she said. Help me. Save me.
edges.note: Cersei is the absent sender whose plea is refused and destroyed — the patient of the rupture. VICTIM_IN flagged verify (she is not physically present; interpretive role for an absent party).

edges.quote: I'll return your nephew in exchange for them.
edges.note: The drawbridge parley: Jaime offers the Blackfish a prisoner exchange (the Westerlings for Edmure), which Brynden contemptuously refuses. NO jaime<->brynden edge existed despite their major confrontation; NEGOTIATES_WITH captures the parley (the deception/bluff within it stays node-prose).

edges.quote: had Ice melted down and reforged. There was enough metal for two new blades. You're holding one.
edges.note: Tywin had the Stark greatsword Ice melted down and reforged into two new Valyrian-steel blades; one is Oathkeeper. Lights the 0-incoming oathkeeper + ice (ice core_in=0). The Ned-Stark's-steel-defends-Ned-Stark's-daughter irony.

edges.quote: There was enough metal for two new blades.
edges.note: The twin blade reforged from Ice is Widow's Wail (Joffrey's sword). Lights widows-wail's provenance (it had only 1 in-edge).

edges.quote: so the blade is wasted on me. Take it.
edges.note: The marquee object beat: Jaime gives Brienne the Valyrian-steel sword (and names it Oathkeeper) to find and protect Sansa — the physical token of his vow to Catelyn. The artifact->recipient gift the character dyad (VOWS_TO/PROTECTS, S141) did not capture.

edges.quote: Now it appears I have, so the blade is wasted on me.
edges.note: Jaime is the owner-in-transit of the sword (Tywin's gift to him) before he gives it to Brienne. Lights jaime's possession of the blade.
